title: Create Workspace
adminOnlyMessage: Only admins can create workspaces for other users.
userMessage: The name of your new workspace.
versionPreset: This parameter has been preset, and cannot be modified.
externalAuthDescription: This template uses external services for authentication.
externalAuthError: To create a workspace using this template, please connect to all required external authentication providers listed below.
duplicateWarning: Duplicating a workspace only copies its parameters. No state from the old workspace is copied over.
dynamicParametersTooltip: Dynamic Parameters enhances Coder's existing parameter system with real-time validation, conditional parameter behavior, and richer input types.

validation.nameExists: A workspace with this name already exists

options.autoStartDescription: Automatically start the workspace when you log in
options.ttlDescription: Automatically stop the workspace after a period of inactivity
